title: 2026 March Madness Live Updates: Sunday's Second-Round Scores and Bracket Analysis on CBS Sports
body:
The NCAA Tournament has reached its crescendo, with Sunday's second-round games poised to shape the remainder of the 2026 Men's March Madness bracket. After a thrilling opening round, eight more matchups will take center stage, whittling down the field from 32 teams to a projected 16. The stakes are high, as each victory will not only propel teams further into the tournament but also bring them one step closer to a coveted national championship.

Sunday's games promise to be a thrilling conclusion to the first weekend of the Big Dance, with several Cinderella stories still alive in the hunt for a spot in the Sweet 16. A number of top seeds will face stiff challenges, including several lower-seeded teams that have already defied expectations by advancing to the second round. Among these underdogs, several have already made a significant impact, leaving many to wonder if their improbable runs will continue deep into the tournament.

As the field narrows, teams will be forced to confront the reality of their tournament aspirations. For those that advance, the road ahead will be long and arduous, with each subsequent round representing a daunting challenge. Conversely, those that fall short will be left to ponder what could have been, reflecting on the opportunities that slipped through their grasp. The pressure will be palpable, with the margin for error rapidly shrinking as the tournament wears on.

One of the most intriguing aspects of the second round is the clash between top seeds and lower-seeded opponents. These matchups often provide some of the most compelling storylines of the tournament, as the gap between the haves and have-nots is put to the test. Will the top seeds continue to dominate, or will their underdog opponents spring an upset? The possibilities are endless, and the uncertainty surrounding these matchups is what makes the NCAA Tournament so captivating.

While Sunday's games will undoubtedly provide plenty of excitement, they also represent a critical juncture in the tournament. For those that advance, the second round will serve as a springboard for the next phase of the competition, where the stakes will only continue to grow. Conversely, those that fall short will be forced to regroup and reassess their chances, with the possibility of returning next year very much on the horizon.

As the dust settles on Sunday's games, the stage will be set for the final act of the first weekend. The 16 teams that emerge from the second round will be one step closer to their ultimate goal: a national championship. With the tournament's momentum building by the day, the excitement is palpable, and fans around the world will be eagerly awaiting the conclusion of the first weekend. Will the favorites continue to dominate, or will the underdogs pull off another stunning upset? One thing is certain: the 2026 NCAA Tournament will be remembered for years to come, and Sunday's games will be a pivotal moment in shaping the tournament's legacy.
